content.problemStatement:
You are given arrays AAA and BBB of sizes NNN and MMM respectively, such that 1≤Bi≤N1\le B_i \le N1≤Bi​≤N.

For each 1≤i≤M1\le i \le M1≤i≤M:


Sort the suffix of length BiB_iBi​ in array AAA in non-decreasing order.
Output the resultant array AAA after all operations.

Note that a suffix of length XXX denotes the subarray consisting of last XXX elements of the array.


Input Format

The first line consists of a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
The first line of each test case consists of two space-separated integers NNN and MMM, denoting the sizes of arrays AAA and BBB.
The second line of each test case consists of NNN space separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.
The third line of each test case consists of MMM space separated integers B1,B2,…,BMB_1, B_2, \ldots, B_MB1​,B2​,…,BM​.


Output Format
For each test case, output NNN space-separated integers, denoting the resultant array AAA after all operations.
constraints: The sum of NNN and MMM over all test cases would not exceed 2⋅1052\cdot 10^52⋅105 respectively.
